name: Needle Laser
notes: Point-Defense weapon: +3 to intercept missiles/torpedoes. With Psiberface, the Needle Lasers are slaved to the pilot's autonomic nervous system — the ship may take one automatic Wait (Point Defense) action per turn without counting as the pilot's action and without multitasking penalties. Pilot still rolls Gunner (aided by +5 targeting computer and Soul of the Machine). Linked pair fires at ROF 4.
